item.name: Cloudribbon
item.description:
This long and slender cloudfish inhabits the waterfalls of Zorgor.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Peering over the side of Zorgor the Boundless, it might look as though someone's dropped their favorite blue ribbon, but in most cases it's just a cloudfish riding on updrafts using its tiny membranes.
